title: ixophorus glaucus
intro: Ixophorus glaucus, also known as Ague Tree, is a plant species native to tropical America, particularly in Mexico and Central America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of scopoletin, a coumarin derivative with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Ixophorus glaucus has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, offering benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of Ixophorus glaucus include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
